---
title: "The low evidence to treat elderly patients with head and neck cancer"
date: 2025-12-01
author:
  - name: Bertin, Beatriz
  - name: Kowalski, Luiz Paulo
  - name: Matos, Leandro Luongo
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Oral Oncology"
  volume: 171
  doi: "10.1016/j.oraloncology.2025.107764"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">The low evidence to treat elderly patients with head and neck cancer</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
